runs.text: change.org

blockMeta.name: Watch this video to see how …

runs.text: Watch this video to see how you and over 20 million others created change in 2025.
Creating change is never easy—but it's always worth it.

blockMeta.name: Despite all odds, you made r…

runs.text: Despite all odds, you made real change happen in 2025. You started and signed petitions on issues you care about, like:
• Advocating for veterans' mental health
• Protesting data center development in your communities
• Demanding emergency sirens in Kerr County, Texas
• Speaking up to Cracker Barrel
• Holding politicians accountable during the shutdown

blockMeta.name: Watch this video to see some…

runs.text: Watch this video to see some of the many ways you helped speak truth to power—and made your voice impossible to ignore.

blockMeta.name: Smiles, click to watch the video

props.text: Smiles, click to watch the video

blockMeta.name: You proved that change is st…

runs.text: You proved that change is still possible when we come together. That is what our platform is for—to help you make the change you want to see in the world.
Celebrate your impact this year by watching this video. Share it on social media and invite your friends to join you with a resolution to keep creating change next year.

blockMeta.name: We can't wait to see the cha…

runs.text: We can't wait to see the change you make in 2026.
—The Change.org Team
